title: quercus villariana subsp. clementei
intro: Quercus villariana subsp. clementei, also known as the Quercus clementei or Pyrenean oak, is a subspecies of deciduous tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are found in its leaves and bark. The health benefits of Quercus villariana subsp. clementei include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
